title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings then Security and selecting Reset Password.

title: Create Account
content: Users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account from Account Settings.

title: Change Email
content: Users can update their email address in Profile Settings.

title: Update Password
content: Users can change their password from the Security section.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support via the Help Center or email support@example.com.
